stemHtml: On the INS control panel, the rotary knob can be selected to OFF, NAV or ATT positions. The correct statement is…

options.a: ATT is the normal system setting; the NAV position inhibits the attitude data.
options.b: NAV is the normal system setting; the ATT position is the back up position in case of failure of the navigation function.
options.c: NAV is the normal system setting; the OFF position is the back up position in case of failure of the navigation function.
options.d: ATT is the normal system setting.
